meta.title: Will the FTC's Section 13(b) Disgorgement Powers Survive Supreme Court Review?
meta.description: Join Hudson for a conversation with John J. Vecchione, moderated by Hudson Senior Fellow Harold Furchtgott-Roth, discussing the prospects of this extraordinary power which allows the FTC to seize billions in assets every year.
